evaluations.name: Trading Hours Energy Profile
evaluations.recommendation: Verify lighting and HVAC shut down within 30 min of close.

evaluations.name: Weekend Higher Traffic Pattern
evaluations.recommendation: Scale HVAC and lighting to footfall forecasts for weekend optimization.

evaluations.name: High Night-Time Base Load
evaluations.message: Building is consuming 0.719% of daytime energy overnight.
evaluations.recommendation: Investigate equipment left running overnight. Schedule HVAC setback.

evaluations.name: Demand Spike Detection
evaluations.message: Peak demand is 4.3x the average — opportunity to flatten load curve.
evaluations.recommendation: Implement demand response: stagger HVAC start, shift non-critical loads.

evaluations.name: Lighting Dominant Load
evaluations.recommendation: LED retrofit and daylight harvesting sensors can reduce lighting load 30-50%.

evaluations.name: Weather Sensitivity Check
evaluations.message: Energy use is 18% correlated with outdoor temperature.
evaluations.recommendation: Optimize HVAC based on temperature forecast to reduce reactive energy spikes.

evaluations.name: Seasonal Energy Pattern
evaluations.recommendation: Seasonal HVAC tuning can yield 10-20% energy savings.

evaluations.name: Post-Close Energy Waste
evaluations.recommendation: Install smart lighting with occupancy detection and auto-close timers.
